member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.IsLastNameFirstLogic.UnknownFirstName(KellermanSoftware.NameParser.ParsedNamePart)
member.summary: Mom and dad named their child something like NAUDAIN IVES SELLERS

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.IsLastNameFirstLogic.FirstNameComesLater(KellermanSoftware.NameParser.ParsedNamePart)
member.summary: Last Name Prefix or unknown last name comes first
member.example: DE LA FUENTE JOHN RAMMACHER HOGARTH JR.

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.IsLastNameFirstLogic.FirstWordNotInLastNameList(KellermanSoftware.NameParser.ParsedNamePart)
member.summary: First word is not in the last name list so it must be a first name

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.IsLastNameFirstLogic.LastNameFirstNameWithComma
member.summary: Last Name, First Name

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.IsLastNameFirstLogic.RankOrHonorificIsFirstWord
member.summary: If a rank or honorific comes first, it is First Name Last Name Order

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.IsLastNameFirstLogic.IEEECitationFormat
member.summary: IEEE Citation Format

member.name: T:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameLists
member.summary: Internal lists of names

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameLists.CompanyIdentifiers
member.summary: Get identifiers for companies

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameLists.MaleNames
member.summary: Get Male Names with their census values

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameLists.FemaleNames
member.summary: Get Female Names with their census values

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameLists.LastNamePrefixes
member.summary: Get last name prefixes like VAN and VON

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameLists.MaleHonorifics
member.summary: Get honorifics that determine a male gender such as MR, SENOR

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameLists.FemaleHonorifics
member.summary: Get honorifics that determine female gender such as MISS, MRS, MS

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameLists.NeutralHonorifics
member.summary: Get neutral honorifics such as MD, DR, DOCTOR

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameLists.Suffixes
member.summary: Get suffixes like SR, JR, USMC

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameLists.Ranks
member.summary: Get a list of military ranks

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameLists.MaleHispanic
member.summary: Get a list of male hispanic names

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameLists.FemaleHispanic
member.summary: Get a list of female hispanic names

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameLists.Conjunctions
member.summary: Get a list of conjunctions like AND, OR

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameLists.UnisexNames
member.summary: Get a list of names that could be male or female like Chris

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameLists.MaleDoubleFirstNames
member.summary: Get a list of double first names like LYNN WOOD

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameLists.FemaleDoubleFirstNames
member.summary: Get a list of female double first names like SARA MARIE with the census numbers

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameLists.LastNames
member.summary: Get a list of last names with census numbers

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameLists.ReadResourceIntoHashSet(System.String)
member.summary: This is the fastest way: https://cc.davelozinski.com/c-sharp/fastest-way-to-read-text-files

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameLists.ReadResourceIntoDictionary(System.String)
member.summary: This is the fastest way: https://cc.davelozinski.com/c-sharp/fastest-way-to-read-text-files

member.name: T:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameMatchingLogic
member.summary: Internal matching logic

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameMatchingLogic.NameMatch(KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts,KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts)
member.summary: Returns true if the name or nicknames match

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameMatchingLogic.GetRootNames(KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts)
member.summary: Get the root name for a nickname

member.name: T:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameOrder
member.summary: The expected order of the name.

member.name: F:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameOrder.FirstLast
member.summary: First Name then Last Name. Example: Vanessa Hodges

member.name: F:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameOrder.LastFirst
member.summary: Last Name then First Name. Example: Hodges Vanessa

member.name: F:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameOrder.AutoDetect
member.summary: Detect the first and last name position by looking for a first name

member.name: T:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParserLogic
member.summary: Parse a name into first name, last name, middle initial

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParserLogic.CustomMultiWordLastNames
member.summary: Property for loading unique multi-word last names

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParserLogic.CustomMultiWordFirstNames
member.summary: Gets or sets the multi word first names.

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParserLogic.CompanyIdentifiers
member.summary: Get or sets a list of words that identify names as companies

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParserLogic.ProcessMultiWordFirstNames
member.summary: By default Name Parser will try to detect multi word first names like John Paul and Abdel Rahman. Set to false to turn off.

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParserLogic.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Extend the trial of the Software

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParserLogic.#ctor
member.summary: Trial constructor

example.code: Dim parser as NameParserLogic = new NameParserLogic() 'Trial Mode

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParserLogic.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Licensed constructor

example.code: NameParserLogic parser = new NameParserLogic("place user name here", "place license key here");
Dim parser as NameParserLogic = new NameParserLogic("place user name here", "place license key here")

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParserLogic.CheckLicense(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: The variables below are specific to the licensing component

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParserLogic.ParseName(System.String,KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameOrder)
member.summary: Parse a name into parts such as first name, last name, middle initial etc.

example.code: Dim parser As New NameParserLogic() 'Trial Mode 'Dim parser As New NameParserLogic("place user name here", "place license key here") 'License Mode Dim parts As NameParts = parser.ParseName("Mr. John Albert Jones Jr.", NameOrder.AutoDetect) Console.WriteLine(parts.Honorific) Console.WriteLine(parts.FirstName) Console.WriteLine(parts.MiddleName) Console.WriteLine(parts.LastName) Console.WriteLine(parts.Suffix) Console.WriteLine(parts.IsMale)

member.param: Example: Mr. John A. Smith Jr.
Detect the first name and last name order
member.returns: The parsed name

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParserLogic.NameMatch(KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts,KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts)
member.summary: Detects if two names match. Detects roots such as John and Johnathan

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParserLogic.GetRootNames(KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts)
member.summary: Get root names for a firstName

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParserLogic.HandleJr(System.String,KellermanSoftware.NameParser.ParsedNamePart)
member.summary: According to Census Records, JR can be a first name, and a last name. That makes no sense. It should always be a suffix.

member.name: T:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts
member.summary: Result from parsing a name

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts.#ctor
member.summary: Default Constructor

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts.#ctor(KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameMatchingLogic)
member.summary: Constructor with name matching logic

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts.RootName
member.summary: The root of the first name. Example: Matt will return MATTHEW

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts.RootNames
member.summary: A list of root names for the first name. Example: Matt will return MATTHEW, MATTHIAS

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts.IsMale
member.summary: If true then a male, if false then female, if null, the gender could not be determined

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts.Rank
member.summary: Military Rank: PFC, Private First Class, GEN, General, etc

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts.Honorific
member.summary: Honorific portion of the name: Mr, Mrs, Miss, etc.

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts.FirstName
member.summary: The first name

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts.NickName
member.summary: The nickname if specified. Example: Mr. William (Willy) King

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts.LastName
member.summary: The last name

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts.CompanyName
member.summary: If it is not a person, this will be filled in with the company name

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts.MiddleName
member.summary: The middle name or middle initial

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts.Suffix
member.summary: The suffix: Jr, Sr, etc.

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts.SpouseFirstName
member.summary: The name of the spouse if there is a spouse in the name; Leo and Donna Bennett

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts.SpouseMiddleName
member.summary: The middle name of the spouse if there is a spouse in the name; Smith, Michael S and Michelle J

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts.SpouseIsMale
member.summary: If true the spouse is male, if false the spouse is female, if null the gender could not be determined

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts.IsMarried
member.summary: If true there are two names in within the name and it is considered married

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.NameParts.ToString
member.summary: Overridden ToString that prints out all properties

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.NameParser.ParserParameters.StartsWithRank
member.summary: If true the name begins with the rank. If false it ends with the rank. If null there is no rank.

member.name: T:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniFile
member.summary:
Create a New INI file to store or load data
Author: Gregory T. Finzer
Date: 10/12/2002

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniFile.Path
member.summary: Returns the path to the ini file

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniFile.INIPathWritable
member.summary: Returns True if the INI path is writable

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniFile.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: INIFile Constructor.
member.PARAM: File Path to the INI File

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniFile.IniWriteValue(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Write Data to the INI File

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniFile.CheckINIPath
member.summary: Ensure the directory exists for the

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniFile.IniReadValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Read Data from an INI File
member.returns: Value

member.name: T:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.Entry
member.summary: Hold Subscription Entries

member.name: T:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniReaderWriter
member.summary: Fully Managed INI File Reader and Writer without any COM Interop See: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/INI_file See: http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/windows/desktop/ms724348%28v=vs.85%29.aspx

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniReaderWriter.FileEncoding
member.summary: Override the file encoding. The default is Encoding.Default

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniReaderWriter.IsProcessEscapeCharactersEnabled
member.summary: If true, escape characters will be processed. The default is false. See http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/INI_file

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniReaderWriter.CommentCharacter
member.summary: The comment character. By default it is a semicolon

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniReaderWriter.Delimiter
member.summary: The delimiter between settings and values. By default it is a equals sign

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniReaderWriter.GetPrivateProfileString(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String@,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary:
Managed version of GetPrivateProfileString
No COM Interop is used
If the file does not exist or the value is not in the file, the defaultValue is used.
See: http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/windows/desktop/ms724348%28v=vs.85%29.aspx
member.param: The default value if there is no value
The number of buffer characters (not used but here for backward compatibility)
The path to the INI file
member.exception: Occurs when sectionName, settingName or filePath is null
member.returns: Number of characters returned

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniReaderWriter.GetPrivateProfileString(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Text.StringBuilder,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary:
Managed version of GetPrivateProfileString
No COM Interop is used
If the file does not exist or the value is not in the file, the defaultValue is used.
See: http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/windows/desktop/ms724348%28v=vs.85%29.aspx
member.param: The default value if there is no value
The number of buffer characters (not used but here for backward compatibility)
The path to the INI file
member.exception: Occurs when sectionName, settingName or filePath is null
member.returns: Number of characters returned

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniReaderWriter.WritePrivateProfileString(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary:
Managed version of WritePrivateProfileString
No COM Interop is used
If the file does not exist it will be created. If the section does not exist it will be created. If the setting already exists it will be updated. If the setting does not exist, it will be added.
See: http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/windows/desktop/ms724348%28v=vs.85%29.aspx
member.param: The path to the INI file
member.exception: Occurs when sectionName, settingName or filePath is null
member.returns: True if the setting was set successfully

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniReaderWriter.GetPrivateProfileInt(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary:
Managed version of GetPrivateProfileInt
No COM Interop is used
If the file does not exist or the value is not in the file, the defaultValue is used.
See: http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/windows/desktop/ms724348%28v=vs.85%29.aspx
member.param: The default value if there is no value
The path to the INI file
member.exception: Occurs when sectionName, settingName or filePath is null
member.returns: The integer

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniReaderWriter.GetSectionNames(System.String)
member.summary:
Get a list of the sections in an INI file
No COM Interop is used
If the file does not exist, no sections will be returned.
member.param: The path to the INI file
member.returns: A list of the section names

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniReaderWriter.GetSectionValues(System.String,System.String)
member.summary:
Get a dictionary of the key value pairs for a section in an INI file
No COM Interop is used
If the file does not exist, no items will be returned.
member.param: The path to the INI file
member.exception: Occurs when sectionName, or filePath is null
member.returns: A list of the settings and their values

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniReaderWriter.SettingExists(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary:
Return true if a setting exists
No COM Interop is used
If the file does not exist or the setting does not exist, the value returned will be false.
member.param: The path to the INI File
member.exception: Occurs when sectionName, settingName or filePath is null

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniReaderWriter.GetSetting(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary:
Get the value for a setting in a section
No COM Interop is used
If the file does not exist or the setting does not exist, the value returned will be null.
member.param: The path to the INI File
member.exception: Occurs when sectionName, settingName or filePath is null

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniReaderWriter.SaveSetting(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary:
Save a value to an INI file
No COM Interop is used
If the file does not exist it will be created. If the section does not exist it will be created. If the setting already exists it will be updated. If the setting does not exist, it will be added.
member.param: The path to the INI file
member.exception: Occurs when sectionName, settingName or filePath is null
member.returns: True if it was saved successfully

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.IniReaderWriter.DeleteSetting(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary:
Delete a setting from an INI file
No COM Interop is used
If the file does not exist or the value does not exist, false will be returned.
member.param: The path to the INI file
member.exception: Occurs when sectionName, settingName or filePath is null
member.returns: True if the setting was deleted

member.name: T:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.Encryption
member.summary: This class provides methods Encryption and Decryption using a variety of cryptographic algorithms. The methods are overloaded to perform encryption/decryption on ordinary texts of string, a MemoryStream or a complete file (text or binary).

member.name: F:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.Encryption.alg
member.summary: The variable that will hold the relevant instantiated cryptographic class object.

member.name: F:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.Encryption.provider
member.summary: Enumeration that specifies the cryptographic service provider.

member.name: F:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.Encryption.strKey
member.summary: Serves as password used with salt to generate Key for encryption

member.name: F:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.Encryption.strSalt
member.summary: The salt used for generating Key for encryption

member.name: F:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.Encryption.ivChars
member.summary: The character array from which we set our initialization vector.

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.Encryption.#ctor
member.summary: Default constructor for the Encryption class.

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.Encryption.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Alternate Constructor for the Encryption class.
member.param: The password used for generating the Key.
The Salt to be used in conjunction with the password to generate the actual Key.

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.Encryption.Key
member.summary: Public property for Key

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.Encryption.Salt
member.summary: Public property for Salt

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.Encryption.GetIV
member.summary: Get an initialization vector for the crypto algorithms. TODO: Random IV Generation
member.returns: a byte array that contains the generated initialization vector.

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.Encryption.GetKey
member.summary: Gets the appropriate key for the cryptographic algorithm being used.
member.returns: a byte array that contains the generated key.

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.Encryption.InitializeAlgorithm(KellermanSoftware.Licensing.EncryptionProvider)
member.summary: Instantiates the SymmetricAlgorithm object with the appropriate cryptographic service provider class.
member.param: Enumeration that specifies which cryptographic algorithm is being used.

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.Encryption.Encrypt(KellermanSoftware.Licensing.EncryptionProvider,System.String)
member.summary: Encrypts a plain string.
member.param: Specifies what encryption algorithm is to be used.
member.returns: A base64-encoded representation of the encrypted string.

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.Encryption.Encrypt(KellermanSoftware.Licensing.EncryptionProvider,System.IO.MemoryStream)
member.summary: Encrypts a MemoryStream.
member.param: Specifies what encryption algorithm is to be used.
member.returns: A base64-encoded MemoryStream object

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.Encryption.Encrypt(KellermanSoftware.Licensing.EncryptionProvider,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Encrypts the contents of a text file and outputs them to another file. TODO: Convert to Base64
member.param: Specifies what encryption algorithm is to be used.
The path to the input file.
The path to the output file.
member.returns: A boolean that specifies whether the encryption operation was successful or not.

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.Encryption.Decrypt(KellermanSoftware.Licensing.EncryptionProvider,System.String)
member.summary: Decrypts a base64-encoded string.
member.param: Specifies what encryption algorithm is to be used.
member.returns: The decrypted plain text.

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.Encryption.Decrypt(KellermanSoftware.Licensing.EncryptionProvider,System.IO.MemoryStream)
member.summary: Decrypts a base64-encoded MemoryStream.
member.param: Specifies what encryption algorithm is to be used.
member.returns: Simple MemoryStream object.

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.Encryption.Decrypt(KellermanSoftware.Licensing.EncryptionProvider,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Decrypts the contents of a text file and outputs them to another file.
member.param: Specifies what encryption algorithm is to be used.
The path to the input file.
The path to the output file.
member.returns: A boolean that specifies whether the decryption operation was successful or not.

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.AdditionalInfo
member.summary: Additional information about the success or failure of a public method

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.FailedAttemptsToday
member.summary: The failed attempts at checking a license today

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.TrialExtensions
member.summary: The number of trial extensions for this user

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.TrialDays
member.summary: The number of days for a trial period

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.BetaExpirationDate
member.summary: Returns the maximum date the software can run in beta

member.summary: Constructor

member.name: P:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.IsService
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the application is a windows service.
member.value: true if this instance is service; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.ValidateInput
member.summary: Ensure required input

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.UsDateToString(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Convert a DateTime to a US date string

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.UsDateToDate(System.String)
member.summary: Convert a US formatted date to DateTime

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.SetTargetLicense
member.summary: Set the target license for the

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.SetupVariables
member.summary: A bunch of variable initialization

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.StartTrial
member.summary: This is a new installation so start the trial

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.BetaExpired
member.summary: Returns true if the beta has expired

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.AllKeysBlank
member.summary: Returns true if all the keys are blank

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.SomeKeysBlank
member.summary: Returns true if some of the keys are blank

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.GetKeys
member.summary: Get all the keys from the registry and the INI file

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.GetTrialExtensions
member.summary: Get the number of trial extensions

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.GetFailedAttemptsToday
member.summary: Get the number of failed attempts today

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.GetUserName
member.summary: Get the saved user name from the registry

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.GetLicense
member.summary: Get the saved user name from the registry

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.GetLastRunDate
member.summary: Get the last date the component was run, prevents back dating

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.GetInstallationDate
member.summary: Get the date the component was installed

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.CombineKey(System.String)
member.summary: Combine the key for the

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.ReadFromIni(System.String)
member.summary: Read the key from the INI file

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.SaveToRegistryAndIni(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Save the key and value to the registry and INI file. Use the different encryption key for each.

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.SaveToIniFile(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Save a key to an INI file

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.UpperLetterSpace(System.String)
member.summary: Make the text upper case and return only letters and spaces

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.GetProductShortName(System.String)
member.summary: Extract product short name from the given product code.

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.GetMajorVersion(System.String)
member.summary: Extract major version from the given product code.

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.ExtendTrial(System.String)
member.summary: Trial extensions are good for the current day and the the next day

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.TrialMessage
member.summary: User friendly trial days remaining

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.TrialDaysLeft
member.summary: Returns the number of days left in the trial

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.CheckLicense
member.summary: Check to see if it is a valid license OR the user is within the trial period

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.CheckTrial(System.String)
member.summary: Check trial code.

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.TrialValid
member.summary: Returns true if the trial is valid, false if it is expired, hacked, or backdated

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.Mid(System.Object,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Same as VB mid function except it doesn't bomb at all
member.returns: Section of string

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.Mid(System.Object,System.Int32)
member.summary: Same as VB mid function except it doesn't bomb at all
member.returns: The string section

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.Asc(System.String)
member.summary: Get the ASCII value for the left most character of the passed string.
member.returns: ACSCII value of the leftmost character

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.Right(System.Object,System.Int32)
member.summary: Same as VB function but doesn't bomb
member.returns: String section

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.GetLastWord(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get the last word in a string

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.NumberOfWords(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Calculate the number of words in a string
member.returns: The number of words in the string

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Licensing.LicensingLibrary.GetField(System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Parses sSentence delimited by sSeperator and returns the word specified by iPosition
member.param: What the words are delmited by
member.returns: "" or the word found

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Common.Util.GetCurrentDirectory
member.summary: Get the current directory of the executing assembly

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Common.Util.PathSlash(System.String)
member.summary: Ensure the passed string ends with a directory seperator character unless the string is blank.
member.param: The string to append the backslash to.
member.returns: String with a "/" on the end

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Common.Util.ExtractPath(System.String)
member.summary: Extract the path from a path ending in a filename
member.param: A fully qualified path ending in a filename
member.returns: The extacted path

member.name: M:KellermanSoftware.Common.Util.Writable(System.String)
member.summary: Check to see if the program can create, update, and delete in the specified path.
member.returns: True if the path is writable.
